title: attendance — realtime broadcast channels
description: Five broadcast channels: tenant / session / athlete / user / coach. Powers live session-roster views for coaches, live check-in dashboards for admins, and per-athlete attendance status for guardians.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.attendance
channels.description: Tenant-wide attendance lifecycle stream. Powers the admin's real-time attendance dashboard.

channels.name: session.{sessionId}.attendance
channels.description: Session-scoped roster + check-in stream. Powers the coach's session-day dashboard — head coach sees athletes check in live during session start.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `attendance.viewAny.coach` scoped to session's assignments OR permission `attendance.viewAny` scoped to session's branch)

channels.name: athlete.{athleteId}.attendance
channels.description: Per-athlete attendance stream. Powers the athlete detail page's attendance timeline + guardian dashboard.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `attendance.view` scoped to athlete OR athlete's guardian via .own OR self as adult athlete)

channels.name: user.{userId}.attendance
channels.description: Per-user attendance stream — powers the /me/attendance live widget for guardians + adult athletes. Fans out attendance events for every athlete the user is linked to (self as adult athlete OR guardian's assigned athletes).
events: AttendanceRecorded (where athlete.user_id = userId OR guardian.user_id = userId)

channels.name: coach.{coachId}.attendance
channels.description: Per-coach attendance stream — attendance events across every session the coach is assigned to. Powers the coach's roster dashboard.
events: AttendanceRecorded (where session.head_coach_id = coachId OR coach is assigned as assistant)
